meaning: <俄>n.卡秋莎(火箭炮)[女子名,昵称]
examples: The legendary Katyusha multiple-launch rocket system.
Today, the Nurit Radar System is used by the Artillery Corps and it enables them to locate missiles including Grad, Qassam and Katyusha missiles that have been fired at Israel.
On the ground, I met a family who saw their house destroyed by a Katyusha rocket.
On the last day of the war, Manan says, a Katyusha scored a direct hit on his house.
